channel.title: LLM Vendor Daily Digest
channel.description: Bilingual daily digests generated from vendor sources.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-18)
item.description:
## English
### Google * Google expands its Personal Intelligence feature to more users, integrating capabilities from Search, Photos, and Gmail. [Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/personal-intelligence-expansion/) * Google announces a new investment in open source security tools designed to protect AI systems in the modern era. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/safety-security/ai-powered-open-source-security/)
## 中文
### Google * Google 扩展了其“个人智能”功能，将其与搜索、相册和 Gmail 的能力相结合，惠及更多用户。 [链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/personal-intelligence-expansion/) * Google 宣布对开源安全工具进行新的投资，旨在保护现代时代的 AI 系统。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/safety-security/ai-powered-open-source-security/)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-14)
item.description:
## English ### AWS Machine Learning Blog - [P-EAGLE: Faster LLM inference with Parallel Speculative Decoding in vLLM](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/p-eagle-faster-llm-inference-with-parallel-speculative-decoding-in-vllm/) (2026-03-14 03:27) - In this post, we explain how P-EAGLE works, how we integrated it into vLLM starting from v0.16.0 (PR#32887), and how to serve it with our pre-trained checkpoints.
### Hugging Face Blog - [Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemo-retriever-agentic-retrieval) (2026-03-14 04:00)
## 中文 ### AWS Machine Learning Blog - [P-EAGLE: Faster LLM inference with Parallel Speculative Decoding in vLLM](https://aws.amazon.com/blogs/machine-learning/p-eagle-faster-llm-inference-with-parallel-speculative-decoding-in-vllm/) (2026-03-14 03:27) - In this post, we explain how P-EAGLE works, how we integrated it into vLLM starting from v0.16.0 (PR#32887), and how to serve it with our pre-trained checkpoints.
### Hugging Face Blog - [Beyond Semantic Similarity: Introducing NVIDIA NeMo Retriever’s Generalizable Agentic Retrieval Pipeline](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemo-retriever-agentic-retrieval) (2026-03-14 04:00)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-11)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing The Anthropic Institute](https://www.anthropic.com/news/the-anthropic-institute) (2026-03-11 00:00)
### Hugging Face Blog - [Code Concepts: A Large-Scale Synthetic Dataset Generated from Programming Concept Seeds](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/synthetic-code-concepts) (2026-03-11 15:50)
### OpenAI - [From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment](https://openai.com/index/equip-responses-api-computer-environment) (2026-03-11 11:00) - How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state. - [Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI](https://openai.com/index/wayfair) (2026-03-11 11:00) - Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale. - [Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection](https://openai.com/index/designing-agents-to-resist-prompt-injection) (2026-03-11 11:30) - How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows. - [Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex](https://openai.com/index/rakuten) (2026-03-11 13:00) - Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
### Together AI Blog - [Together AI Brings NVIDIA Nemotron 3 to Developers on Day 0](https://www.together.ai/blog/nvidia-nemotron-3-super) (2026-03-11 00:00) - NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is now available on Together AI Dedicated Inference, delivering efficient multi-agent reasoning, a 1M-token context window, and production-grade deployment on managed infrastructure.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing The Anthropic Institute](https://www.anthropic.com/news/the-anthropic-institute) (2026-03-11 00:00)
### Hugging Face Blog - [Code Concepts: A Large-Scale Synthetic Dataset Generated from Programming Concept Seeds](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/synthetic-code-concepts) (2026-03-11 15:50)
### OpenAI - [From model to agent: Equipping the Responses API with a computer environment](https://openai.com/index/equip-responses-api-computer-environment) (2026-03-11 11:00) - How OpenAI built an agent runtime using the Responses API, shell tool, and hosted containers to run secure, scalable agents with files, tools, and state. - [Wayfair boosts catalog accuracy and support speed with OpenAI](https://openai.com/index/wayfair) (2026-03-11 11:00) - Wayfair uses OpenAI models to improve ecommerce support and product catalog accuracy, automating ticket triage and enhancing millions of product attributes at scale. - [Designing AI agents to resist prompt injection](https://openai.com/index/designing-agents-to-resist-prompt-injection) (2026-03-11 11:30) - How ChatGPT defends against prompt injection and social engineering by constraining risky actions and protecting sensitive data in agent workflows. - [Rakuten fixes issues twice as fast with Codex](https://openai.com/index/rakuten) (2026-03-11 13:00) - Rakuten uses Codex, the coding agent from OpenAI, to ship software faster and safer, reducing MTTR 50%, automating CI/CD reviews, and delivering full-stack builds in weeks.
### Together AI Blog - [Together AI Brings NVIDIA Nemotron 3 to Developers on Day 0](https://www.together.ai/blog/nvidia-nemotron-3-super) (2026-03-11 00:00) - NVIDIA Nemotron 3 Super is now available on Together AI Dedicated Inference, delivering efficient multi-agent reasoning, a 1M-token context window, and production-grade deployment on managed infrastructure.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-10)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic will open its fourth office in the Asia-Pacific region in Sydney. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/sydney-fourth-office-asia-pacific
### Google AI * Gemini in Google Sheets has achieved state-of-the-art performance with new beta features for creating and analyzing complex data. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-google-sheets-state-of-the-art/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces Storage Buckets on the Hub to help developers manage large datasets and models more efficiently. | https://huggingface.co/blog/storage-buckets * This post explores lessons learned from 16 open-source reinforcement learning libraries to optimize token usage. | https://huggingface.co/blog/async-rl-training-landscape * Hugging Face details how NVIDIA builds open data pipelines to accelerate AI model training. | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/open-data-for-ai
### OpenAI * ChatGPT now offers interactive visual explanations for math and science, helping students explore concepts in real time. | https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-learn-math-and-science-in-chatgpt * OpenAI introduces the IH-Challenge to train frontier LLMs on prioritizing trusted instructions and resisting prompt injection attacks. | https://openai.com/index/instruction-hierarchy-challenge
### Together AI * Together GPU Clusters now feature built-in autoscaling, observability, and self-healing capabilities for production-ready infrastructure. | https://www.together.ai/blog/new-in-together-gpu-clusters-autoscaling-observability-self-healing
---
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 将在悉尼开设其在亚太地区的第四个办事处。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/sydney-fourth-office-asia-pacific
### Google AI * Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 已达到最先进性能，推出了用于创建和分析复杂数据的新测试版功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/workspace/gemini-google-sheets-state-of-the-art/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 在 Hub 上推出了存储桶功能，帮助开发者更高效地管理大型数据集和模型。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/storage-buckets * 本文探讨了从 16 个开源强化学习库中获得的经验教训，以优化令牌使用。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/async-rl-training-landscape * Hugging Face 详细介绍了 NVIDIA 如何构建开放数据管道以加速 AI 模型训练。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/open-data-for-ai
### OpenAI * ChatGPT 现在提供数学和科学的交互式可视化解释，帮助学生实时探索概念。 | https://openai.com/index/new-ways-to-learn-math-and-science-in-chatgpt * OpenAI 推出了 IH-Challenge，用于训练前沿大语言模型优先处理可信指令并抵抗提示注入攻击。 | https://openai.com/index/instruction-hierarchy-challenge
### Together AI * Together GPU 集群现在内置了自动扩展、可观测性和自愈功能，为生产级基础设施做好准备。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/new-in-together-gpu-clusters-autoscaling-observability-self-healing

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-09)
item.description:
# 2026-03-09
## English
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces Ulysses Sequence Parallelism to enable training models with million-token contexts. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ulysses-sp * Hugging Face releases LeRobot v0.5.0, focusing on scaling every dimension of robotics. | https://huggingface.co/blog/lerobot-release-v050 * Hugging Face highlights IBM's Granite 4.0 1B Speech model, a compact and multilingual solution built for edge devices. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-speech
### OpenAI * OpenAI is acquiring Promptfoo, an AI security platform designed to help enterprises identify and remediate vulnerabilities in AI systems. | https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-promptfoo
## 中文
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 介绍了 Ulysses 序列并行化，以支持百万 token 上下文的模型训练。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ulysses-sp * Hugging Face 发布了 LeRobot v0.5.0，专注于扩展机器人的各个维度。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/lerobot-release-v050 * Hugging Face 介绍了 IBM 的 Granite 4.0 1B 语音模型，这是一个紧凑、多语言且专为边缘设备设计的解决方案。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-granite/granite-4-speech
### OpenAI * OpenAI 正在收购 Promptfoo，这是一款帮助企业在开发过程中识别和修复 AI 系统漏洞的 AI 安全平台。 | https://openai.com/index/openai-to-acquire-promptfoo

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-06)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security](https://www.anthropic.com/news/mozilla-firefox-security) (2026-03-06 00:00)
### Google AI Blog - [How our open-source AI model SpeciesNet is helping to promote wildlife conservation](https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/sustainability/speciesnet-open-source-ai-wildlife/) (2026-03-06 18:00) - Photos of animals being identified by the SpeciesNet AI model
### OpenAI - [How Balyasny Asset Management built an AI research engine for investing](https://openai.com/index/balyasny-asset-management) (2026-03-06 07:00) - See how Balyasny built an AI research system with GPT-5.4, rigorous model evaluation, and agent workflows to transform investment analysis at scale. - [Codex Security: now in research preview](https://openai.com/index/codex-security-now-in-research-preview) (2026-03-06 10:00) - Codex Security is an AI application security agent that analyzes project context to detect, validate, and patch complex vulnerabilities with higher confidence and less noise. - [How Descript enables multilingual video dubbing at scale](https://openai.com/index/descript) (2026-03-06 10:00) - Descript uses OpenAI models to scale multilingual video dubbing, optimizing translations for both meaning and timing so dubbed speech sounds natural across languages.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Partnering with Mozilla to improve Firefox’s security](https://www.anthropic.com/news/mozilla-firefox-security) (2026-03-06 00:00)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-05)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Where things stand with the Department of War](https://www.anthropic.com/news/where-stand-department-war) (2026-03-05 00:00) - A statement from Dario Amodei.
### Google AI Blog - [The latest AI news we announced in February](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-february-2026/) (2026-03-05 16:30) - an MP4 of a carousel with images reading "Gemini 3.1 Pro" and "Nano Banana 2" - [Ask a Techspert: How does AI understand my visual searches?](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/googlers/how-google-ai-visual-search-works/) (2026-03-05 18:00) - Mobile phone with a search bar that says "Ask anything"
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing Modular Diffusers - Composable Building Blocks for Diffusion Pipelines](https://huggingface.co/blog/modular-diffusers) (2026-03-05 00:00) - [Bringing Robotics AI to Embedded Platforms: Dataset Recording, VLA Fine‑Tuning, and On‑Device Optimizations](https://huggingface.co/blog/nxp/bringing-robotics-ai-to-embedded-platforms) (2026-03-05 14:16)
### OpenAI - [Introducing ChatGPT for Excel and new financial data integrations](https://openai.com/index/chatgpt-for-excel) (2026-03-05 00:00) - OpenAI introduces ChatGPT for Excel and new financial app integrations, powered by GPT-5.4 to accelerate modeling, research, and analysis in regulated environments. - [Introducing the Adoption news channel](https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-adoption-news-channel) (2026-03-05 00:00) - Practical insights and frameworks to turn AI progress into business advantage - [The five AI value models driving business reinvention](https://openai.com/index/the-five-ai-value-models-driving-business-reinvention) (2026-03-05 00:00) - Five AI value models show how leaders can sequence AI from workforce fluency to process reinvention and build durable business advantage. - [Ensuring AI use in education leads to opportunity](https://openai.com/index/ai-education-opportunity) (2026-03-05 09:00) - OpenAI shares new tools, certifications, and measurement resources to help schools and universities close AI capability gaps and expand opportunity. - [Introducing GPT-5.4](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-4) (2026-03-05 10:00) - Introducing GPT-5.4, OpenAI’s most most capable and efficient frontier model for professional work, with state-of-the-art coding, computer use, tool search, and 1M-token context. - [Reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, and that’s good](https://openai.com/index/reasoning-models-chain-of-thought-controllability) (2026-03-05 10:00) - OpenAI introduces CoT-Control and finds reasoning models struggle to control their chains of thought, reinforcing monitorability as an AI safety safeguard. - [GPT-5.4 Thinking System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-4-thinking-system-card) (2026-03-05 10:00)
### Together AI Blog - [Key research and product announcements at the AI Native Conf](https://www.together.ai/blog/ai-native-conf-research-and-product-announcements) (2026-03-05 00:00) - At AI Native Conf, Together AI announced breakthroughs across kernels, RL, and inference optimization — including FlashAttention-4, ThunderAgent, and together.compile. Research that ships to production. That's the AI Native Cloud. - [FlashAttention-4: Algorithm and Kernel Pipelining Co-Design for Asymmetric Hardware Scaling](https://www.together.ai/blog/flashattention-4) (2026-03-05 00:00) - As GPU throughput outpaces memory bandwidth, kernels must evolve. We introduce FlashAttention-4, featuring new pipelining for maximum overlap, 2-CTA MMA modes to reduce shared memory traffic, and a hardware-software hybrid approach to so...

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-04)
item.description:
## English
### Google Google introduces Canvas in AI Mode, now available to everyone in the U.S., to help draft documents and build interactive tools directly in Search. [Source Link](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/ai-mode-canvas-writing-coding/)
### MiniMax MiniMax releases Music 2.5+, a model designed to unlock pure music capabilities and break through style boundaries. [Source Link](https://www.minimaxi.com/news/music-25-解锁纯音乐突破风格边界)
### OpenAI OpenAI introduces the Learning Outcomes Measurement Suite to assess AI's impact on student learning across diverse educational environments over time. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/understanding-ai-and-learning-outcomes)
OpenAI shares how Axios uses AI to support local reporters, streamline workflows, and deliver high-impact local journalism at scale. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/axios-allison-murphy)
A new preprint details how GPT-5.2 Pro helps derive and verify nonzero graviton tree amplitudes in quantum gravity. [Source Link](https://openai.com/index/extending-single-minus-amplitudes-to-gravitons)
## 中文
### Google Google 推出 AI 模式中的 Canvas 功能，现已面向美国用户开放，帮助用户在搜索中直接起草文档和构建交互式工具。 [来源链接](https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/ai-mode-canvas-writing-coding/)
### MiniMax MiniMax 发布 Music 2.5+ 模型，旨在解锁纯音乐能力并突破风格边界。 [来源链接](https://www.minimaxi.com/news/music-25-解锁纯音乐突破风格边界)
### OpenAI OpenAI 推出学习成果测量套件，旨在评估 AI 在不同教育环境中对学生学习成果的长期影响。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/understanding-ai-and-learning-outcomes)
OpenAI 分享了 Axios 如何利用 AI 支持本地记者、简化新闻编辑室工作流程，并大规模交付高影响力的本地新闻。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/axios-allison-murphy)
一篇新的预印本展示了 GPT-5.2 Pro 如何帮助推导和验证量子引力中的非零引力子树振幅。 [来源链接](https://openai.com/index/extending-single-minus-amplitudes-to-gravitons)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-03-03)
item.description:
## English ### Google AI Blog - [Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-1-flash-lite/) (2026-03-03 16:34) - Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite logo - [Create new worlds in Project Genie with these 4 tips](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/tips-prompt-writing-project-genie/) (2026-03-03 17:00) - A screen capture of Project Genie, an experimental interface showing a grid of circular images, many of which appear to be 360-degree views, with a large, central black globe labeled Create your own
### Google DeepMind (Blog) - [Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-flash-lite-built-for-intelligence-at-scale/) (2026-03-03 16:35) - Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
### Hugging Face Blog - [PRX Part 3 — Training a Text-to-Image Model in 24h!](https://huggingface.co/blog/Photoroom/prx-part3) (2026-03-03 16:50)
### OpenAI - [GPT-5.3 Instant System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-instant-system-card) (2026-03-03 10:00) - [GPT-5.3 Instant: Smoother, more useful everyday conversations](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-instant) (2026-03-03 10:00)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-27)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth](https://www.anthropic.com/news/statement-comments-secretary-war) (2026-02-27 00:00) - Anthropic's response to the Secretary of War and advice to customers.
### OpenAI - [An update on our mental health-related work](https://openai.com/index/update-on-mental-health-related-work) (2026-02-27 00:00) - OpenAI shares updates on its mental health safety work, including parental controls, trusted contacts, improved distress detection, and recent litigation developments. - [Joint Statement from OpenAI and Microsoft](https://openai.com/index/continuing-microsoft-partnership) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Microsoft and OpenAI continue to work closely across research, engineering, and product development, building on years of deep collaboration and shared success. - [Introducing the Stateful Runtime Environment for Agents in Amazon Bedrock](https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-stateful-runtime-environment-for-agents-in-amazon-bedrock) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Stateful Runtime for Agents in Amazon Bedrock brings persistent orchestration, memory, and secure execution to multi-step AI workflows powered by OpenAI. - [Scaling AI for everyone](https://openai.com/index/scaling-ai-for-everyone) (2026-02-27 05:30) - Today we’re announcing $110B in new investment at a $730B pre money valuation. This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon. - [OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership](https://openai.com/index/amazon-partnership) (2026-02-27 05:30) - OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Statement on the comments from Secretary of War Pete Hegseth](https://www.anthropic.com/news/statement-comments-secretary-war) (2026-02-27 00:00) - Anthropic's response to the Secretary of War and advice to customers.

This includes $30B from SoftBank, $30B from NVIDIA, and $50B from Amazon. - [OpenAI and Amazon announce strategic partnership](https://openai.com/index/amazon-partnership) (2026-02-27 05:30) - OpenAI and Amazon announce a strategic partnership bringing OpenAI’s Frontier platform to AWS, expanding AI infrastructure, custom models, and enterprise AI agents.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-25)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic (Newsroom) Anthropic acquires Vercept to advance Claude's computer use capabilities. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/acquires-vercept
### Google AI Blog Google introduces Circle to Search with AI tools like an "AI Overview" for outfit breakdowns and a virtual "Try it on" feature. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/circle-to-search-february-2026/ Google enhances Android on the Samsung Galaxy S26 with improved image recognition and search capabilities. | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/samsung-unpacked-2026/
### OpenAI OpenAI releases a threat report examining how malicious actors combine AI models with websites and social platforms. | https://openai.com/index/disrupting-malicious-ai-uses
### Together AI Blog Together AI releases CoderForge-Preview, a 161K open dataset for training efficient coding agents. | https://www.together.ai/blog/coderforge-preview
## 中文
### Anthropic (Newsroom) Anthropic 收购 Vercept 以提升 Claude 的计算机使用能力。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/acquires-vercept
### Google AI Blog Google 推出 Circle to Search，包含 AI 概览和虚拟试穿功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/search/circle-to-search-february-2026/ Google 在三星 Galaxy S26 上增强了 Android 的智能功能。 | https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/platforms/android/samsung-unpacked-2026/
### OpenAI OpenAI 发布威胁报告，分析恶意行为者如何结合 AI 模型与网站及社交平台。 | https://openai.com/index/disrupting-malicious-ai-uses
### Together AI Blog Together AI 发布 CoderForge-Preview，这是一个用于训练高效编码代理的 161K 开放数据集。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/coderforge-preview

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-24)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic has released its Responsible Scaling Policy: Version 3.0, outlining updated safety measures for advanced AI systems. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/responsible-scaling-policy-v3
### Hugging Face Hugging Face details how to deploy open-source Vision Language Models (VLMs) on NVIDIA Jetson devices for edge computing. | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/cosmos-on-jetson
### OpenAI OpenAI has appointed Arvind KC as Chief People Officer to help scale the company and strengthen its culture in the age of AI. | https://openai.com/index/arvind-kc-chief-people-officer
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 发布了《负责任扩展政策》3.0 版本，概述了针对先进 AI 系统的更新安全措施。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/responsible-scaling-policy-v3
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 详述了如何在 NVIDIA Jetson 设备上部署开源视觉语言模型 (VLM) 以进行边缘计算。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/cosmos-on-jetson
### OpenAI OpenAI 任命 Arvind KC 为首席人事官，以帮助公司扩大规模并加强 AI 时代的企业文化。 | https://openai.com/index/arvind-kc-chief-people-officer

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-23)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic details methods to detect and prevent distillation attacks on its AI models. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks
### OpenAI OpenAI introduces the Frontier Alliance Partners program to help enterprises scale secure AI agents. | https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners
### OpenAI OpenAI stops using SWE-bench Verified due to test contamination and training leakage, recommending SWE-bench Pro instead. | https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified
### Together AI Together AI research reveals that state-of-the-art speech models fail 39% of the time on street names despite high benchmark scores. | https://www.together.ai/blog/how-speech-models-fail
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 介绍了检测和防止蒸馏攻击的方法。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/detecting-and-preventing-distillation-attacks
### OpenAI OpenAI 宣布推出 Frontier Alliance Partners，帮助企业从 AI 原型转向安全、可扩展的代理部署。 | https://openai.com/index/frontier-alliance-partners
### OpenAI OpenAI 停止评估 SWE-bench Verified，指出该数据集存在测试污染和训练泄露问题，无法准确衡量代码进展，并推荐使用 SWE-bench Pro。 | https://openai.com/index/why-we-no-longer-evaluate-swe-bench-verified
### Together AI Together AI 的新研究显示，尽管 Whisper 和 Deepgram 等顶尖语音模型在基准测试中得分接近人类，但在路名识别上仍有 39% 的失败率。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/how-speech-models-fail

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-20)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic is making frontier cybersecurity capabilities available to defenders. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-code-security)
### Hugging Face GGML and llama.cpp have joined Hugging Face to ensure the long-term progress of Local AI. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/ggml-joins-hf)
### Hugging Face Users can now train AI models for free using Unsloth and Hugging Face Jobs. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/unsloth-jobs)
### OpenAI OpenAI shared its AI model's proof attempts for the First Proof math challenge to test research-grade reasoning. [Link](https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions)
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 正在向防御者提供前沿网络安全能力。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-code-security)
### Hugging Face GGML 和 llama.cpp 已加入 Hugging Face，以确保本地 AI 的长期进步。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/ggml-joins-hf)
### Hugging Face 用户现在可以使用 Unsloth 和 Hugging Face Jobs 免费训练 AI 模型。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/unsloth-jobs)
### OpenAI OpenAI 分享了其 AI 模型在 First Proof 数学挑战中的证明尝试，以测试研究级推理能力。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/first-proof-submissions)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-19)
item.description:
## English
### Google AI Blog Sundar Pichai shares his vision for AI, highlighting a stylized design for "भारत 2026 INDIA" at the AI Impact Summit. [Link](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/message-ceo/sundar-pichai-ai-impact-summit-2026/) Google outlines the partnerships and investments announced during the AI Impact Summit 2026. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-collection/)
### Google DeepMind Google DeepMind introduces Gemini 3.1 Pro, a smarter model designed for complex tasks requiring more than simple answers. [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-pro-a-smarter-model-for-your-most-complex-tasks/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face explores how synthetic personas are helping Japanese AI development overcome data scarcity. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-personas-japan-nttdata-ja)
### OpenAI OpenAI commits $7.5 million to The Alignment Project to fund independent research on AI safety and security risks. [Link](https://openai.com/index/advancing-independent-research-ai-alignment)
### Together AI Together AI introduces Consistency Diffusion Language Models (CDLM), offering up to 14.5x faster inference without quality loss. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/consistency-diffusion-language-models)
***
## 中文
### Google AI Blog Sundar Pichai 分享了他对 AI 的愿景，强调了在 AI 影响峰会上展示的“भारत 2026 INDIA”主题设计。 [Link](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/message-ceo/sundar-pichai-ai-impact-summit-2026/) Google 介绍了在 AI 影响峰会上宣布的合作伙伴关系和投资。 [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-collection/)
### Google DeepMind Google DeepMind 推出了 Gemini 3.1 Pro，这是一个专为需要超越简单答案的复杂任务设计的更智能模型。 [Link](https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-1-pro-a-smarter-model-for-your-most-complex-tasks/)
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 探讨了合成人物角色如何帮助日本 AI 开发克服数据稀缺问题。 [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-personas-japan-nttdata-ja)
### OpenAI OpenAI 承诺向 The Alignment Project 捐赠 750 万美元，以资助独立的 AI 对齐研究，加强全球 AGI 安全工作。 [Link](https://openai.com/index/advancing-independent-research-ai-alignment)
### Together AI Together AI 推出了一致性扩散语言模型 (CDLM)，在不牺牲质量的情况下提供高达 14.5 倍的推理加速。 [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/consistency-diffusion-language-models)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-18)
item.description:
## English
### Google * Google is hosting the AI Impact Summit 2026 in India to discuss partnerships for inclusive AI. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-india/ * The Gemini app now features the Lyria 3 music generation model, allowing users to create 30-second tracks via text or images. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/lyria-3/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind details the integration of Lyria 3 into the Gemini app, enabling text-to-music and image-to-music generation. | https://deepmind.google/blog/a-new-way-to-express-yourself-gemini-can-now-create-music/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces a new feature in Gradio that allows users to build web apps with a single HTML snippet. | https://huggingface.co/blog/gradio-html-one-shot-apps * Hugging Face shares research from IBM and UC Berkeley on evaluating enterprise AI agents using IT-Bench and MAST. | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/itbenchandmast
### OpenAI * OpenAI for India expands AI access across the country by building local infrastructure, powering enterprises, and advancing workforce skills. | https://openai.com/index/openai-for-india
## 中文
### Google * Google将在印度举办AI影响峰会2026，讨论如何通过合作让AI造福所有人。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-impact-summit-2026-india/ * Gemini应用现在集成了Lyria 3音乐生成模型，用户可以通过文本或图片创建30秒的音轨。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/gemini-app/lyria-3/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind详细介绍了Lyria 3与Gemini应用的集成，支持文本和图像生成音乐。 | https://deepmind.google/blog/a-new-way-to-express-yourself-gemini-can-now-create-music/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face在Gradio中引入了新功能，允许用户仅通过一个HTML片段即可构建Web应用。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/gradio-html-one-shot-apps * Hugging Face分享了IBM和加州大学伯克利分校的研究，探讨如何使用IT-Bench和MAST评估企业智能体的失败原因。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/ibm-research/itbenchandmast
### OpenAI * OpenAI for India通过建设本地基础设施、赋能企业以及提升劳动力技能，扩大了AI在印度的普及范围。 | https://openai.com/index/openai-for-india

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-17)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * **Anthropic** released Claude Sonnet 4.6, which delivers frontier performance across coding, agents, and professional work at scale. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6) * **Anthropic** signed an MOU with the Government of Rwanda to advance AI in health and education. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-rwanda-mou) * **Anthropic** is collaborating with Infosys to build AI agents for telecommunications and other regulated industries. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-infosys)
### Google AI * **Google AI** published its 2026 Responsible AI Progress Report, detailing ongoing efforts in safety and ethics. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/responsible-ai-2026-report-ongoing-work/)
### Hugging Face * **Hugging Face** highlighted the NVIDIA Nemotron 2 Nano 9B Japanese model, designed to support sovereign AI in Japan. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2-japanese-ja)
***
## 中文
### Anthropic * **Anthropic** 发布了 Claude Sonnet 4.6，在编码、智能体和专业工作的大规模应用中提供了前沿性能。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-sonnet-4-6) * **Anthropic** 与卢旺达政府签署谅解备忘录，旨在推动健康和教育领域的 AI 发展。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-rwanda-mou) * **Anthropic** 正与 Infosys 合作，为电信和其他受监管行业构建 AI 智能体。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-infosys)
### Google AI * **Google AI** 发布了 2026 年负责任 AI 进展报告，概述了在安全和伦理方面的持续工作。 [链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/responsible-ai-2026-report-ongoing-work/)
### Hugging Face * **Hugging Face** 介绍了 NVIDIA Nemotron 2 Nano 9B 日语模型，该模型旨在支持日本的自主 AI。 [链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-nano-9b-v2-japanese-ja)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-16)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic Anthropic opens a new office in Bengaluru and announces partnerships across India. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/bengaluru-office-partnerships-across-india)
## 中文 ### Anthropic Anthropic 在班加罗尔开设新办公室，并宣布在印度开展多项合作伙伴关系。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/bengaluru-office-partnerships-across-india)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-13)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic partners with CodePath to bring Claude to the US’s largest collegiate computer science program. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-codepath-partnership * Chris Liddell has been appointed to Anthropic’s board of directors. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-liddell-appointed-anthropic-board
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face introduces custom CUDA kernels for Codex and Claude to enhance model performance. | https://huggingface.co/blog/custom-cuda-kernels-agent-skills
### OpenAI * OpenAI details a new real-time access system combining rate limits and credits to scale access to Codex and Sora. | https://openai.com/index/beyond-rate-limits * OpenAI released GABRIEL, an open-source toolkit that uses GPT to convert qualitative text and images into quantitative data for social science research. | https://openai.com/index/scaling-social-science-research * OpenAI introduces Lockdown Mode and Elevated Risk labels in ChatGPT to help organizations defend against prompt injection and data exfiltration. | https://openai.com/index/introducing-lockdown-mode-and-elevated-risk-labels-in-chatgpt * GPT-5.2 proposed a new formula for a gluon amplitude in theoretical physics, which was later formally proved by OpenAI and collaborators. | https://openai.com/index/new-result-theoretical-physics
***
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 与 CodePath 合作，将 Claude 引入美国最大的大学计算机科学项目。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-codepath-partnership * Chris Liddell 被任命为 Anthropic 董事会成员。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-liddell-appointed-anthropic-board
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 推出了适用于 Codex 和 Claude 的自定义 CUDA 内核。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/custom-cuda-kernels-agent-skills
### OpenAI * OpenAI 介绍了结合速率限制和信用额度的实时访问系统，以扩展对 Codex 和 Sora 的访问。 | https://openai.com/index/beyond-rate-limits * OpenAI 发布了 GABRIEL 开源工具包，利用 GPT 将定性文本和图像转化为定量数据，以辅助社会科学研究。 | https://openai.com/index/scaling-social-science-research * OpenAI 在 ChatGPT 中引入了“锁定模式”和“高风险”标签，以帮助组织防御提示注入和数据泄露。 | https://openai.com/index/introducing-lockdown-mode-and-elevated-risk-labels-in-chatgpt * GPT-5.2 在理论物理学中提出了一个新的胶子振幅公式，该公式随后被 OpenAI 和合作者正式证明。 | https://openai.com/index/new-result-theoretical-physics

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-12)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic raises $30 billion in Series G funding led by GIC and Coatue, valuing the company at $380 billion post-money. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation * Anthropic is donating $20 million to Public First Action to support public policy initiatives. | https://www.anthropic.com/news/donate-public-first-action
### Google AI * Google AI introduces Gemini 3 Deep Think, a specialized reasoning mode designed to solve modern science, research, and engineering challenges. | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-deep-think/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind updates its most specialized reasoning mode to tackle complex problems in science, research, and engineering. | https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-deep-think-advancing-science-research-and-engineering/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face shares insights on evaluating tool-using agents in real-world environments with OpenEnv. | https://huggingface.co/blog/openenv-turing
### OpenAI * OpenAI introduces GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark, a real-time coding model offering 15x faster generation and 128k context. | https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5.3-codex-spark
### Together AI * Together AI launches Dedicated Container Inference, a production-grade orchestration tool that delivers up to 2.6x faster inference for custom AI models. | https://www.together.ai/blog/dedicated-container-inference
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 完成由 GIC 和 Coatue 领投的 300 亿美元 G 轮融资，投后估值达 3800 亿美元。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-raises-30-billion-series-g-funding-380-billion-post-money-valuation * Anthropic 向 Public First Action 捐赠 2000 万美元，以支持公共政策倡议。 | https://www.anthropic.com/news/donate-public-first-action
### Google AI * Google AI 推出 Gemini 3 Deep Think，这是一种专门化的推理模式，旨在解决现代科学、研究和工程挑战。 | https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/gemini-models/gemini-3-deep-think/
### Google DeepMind * Google DeepMind 更新了其最专业的推理模式，以应对科学、研究和工程领域的复杂问题。 | https://deepmind.google/blog/gemini-3-deep-think-advancing-science-research-and-engineering/
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 分享了关于在现实环境中评估工具使用代理的见解。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/openenv-turing
### OpenAI * OpenAI 推出 GPT-5.3-Codex-Spark，这是一种实时编码模型，提供 15 倍更快的生成速度和 128k 上下文。 | https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5.3-codex-spark
### Together AI * Together AI 推出 Dedicated Container Inference，这是一种生产级编排工具，可为自定义 AI 模型提供高达 2.6 倍的推理加速。 | https://www.together.ai/blog/dedicated-container-inference

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-11)
item.description:
## 2026-02-11
### English
* **Anthropic** Anthropic discusses the impact of rising electricity prices on its data centers and how they are managing these costs. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/covering-electricity-price-increases) * **OpenAI** OpenAI explores "harness engineering" to leverage Codex within an agent-first architecture. [Link](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering) * **Together AI** Together AI introduces a Cache-aware Prefill-Decode (CPD) architecture that improves long-context LLM serving speed by up to 40%. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/cache-aware-disaggregated-inference)
### 中文
* **Anthropic** Anthropic 讨论了数据中心电价上涨的影响以及如何管理这些成本。 [链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/covering-electricity-price-increases) * **OpenAI** OpenAI 探索了“Harness 工程”，以便在以智能体优先的世界中利用 Codex。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/harness-engineering) * **Together AI** Together AI 介绍了一种缓存感知的预填充-解码（CPD）架构，可将长上下文 LLM 的服务速度提高 40%。 [链接](https://www.together.ai/blog/cache-aware-disaggregated-inference)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-10)
item.description:
## English
### Google * Google discusses efforts to help kids and teens learn and grow online on Safer Internet Day 2026. https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/safety-security/safer-internet-day-2026-kids-teens/ * Google shares nine fun questions to try asking Google Photos to get the most out of the Ask Photos feature. https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/photos/ask-button-ask-photos-tips/
## 中文
### Google * Google 讨论了在 2026 年国际网络安全日如何帮助儿童和青少年在线学习和成长。 https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/safety-security/safer-internet-day-2026-kids-teens/ * Google 分享了 9 个有趣的问题，帮助用户充分利用 Ask Photos 功能。 https://blog.google/products-and-platforms/products/photos/ask-button-ask-photos-tips/

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-09)
item.description:
## English
### Hugging Face Hugging Face releases a preview of Transformers.js v4, now available on NPM for browser-based inference. | https://huggingface.co/blog/transformersjs-v4
### OpenAI OpenAI begins testing ads in ChatGPT to support free access, featuring clear labeling, answer independence, strong privacy protections, and user control. | https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt
OpenAI for Government deploys a custom ChatGPT on GenAI.mil to provide secure, safety-forward AI solutions to U.S. defense teams. | https://openai.com/index/bringing-chatgpt-to-genaimil
## 中文
### Hugging Face Hugging Face 发布了 Transformers.js v4 预览版，现已可在 NPM 上使用，支持浏览器端推理。 | https://huggingface.co/blog/transformersjs-v4
### OpenAI OpenAI 开始在 ChatGPT 中测试广告以支持免费访问，包含清晰的标签、答案独立性、强大的隐私保护和用户控制。 | https://openai.com/index/testing-ads-in-chatgpt
OpenAI for Government 在 GenAI.mil 上部署了定制版 ChatGPT，为美国国防团队提供安全、以安全为先的 AI 解决方案。 | https://openai.com/index/bringing-chatgpt-to-genaimil

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-06)
item.description:
## English
### OpenAI * OpenAI has updated its privacy policy specifically for Korea to comply with local regulations. | [https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy](https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy) * OpenAI outlines its localization strategy, explaining how frontier models can be adapted to local languages and laws while maintaining safety. | [https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization](https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization)
### Together AI * New research investigates what LLMs generate when not given specific instructions, revealing distinct "knowledge priors" across different model families like GPT, Llama, and DeepSeek. | [https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think](https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think)
## 中文
### OpenAI * OpenAI 更新了韩国隐私政策，以符合当地法规。 | [https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy](https://openai.com/policies/kr-privacy-policy) * OpenAI 分享了其本地化策略，解释了如何在不牺牲安全性的前提下，将前沿模型适配到当地语言、法律和文化中。 | [https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization](https://openai.com/index/our-approach-to-localization)
### Together AI * 新研究调查了当未给出具体指令时大语言模型会生成什么，揭示了 GPT、Llama、DeepSeek 等不同模型家族之间独特的“知识先验”。 | [https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think](https://www.together.ai/blog/what-llms-think)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-05)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing Claude Opus 4.6](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6) (2026-02-05 00:00) - We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.
### Google AI Blog - [Watch our new Gemini ad ahead of football’s biggest weekend](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/gemini-ad-new-home/) (2026-02-05 14:30) - A toddler in a blue and yellow striped shirt sits on a kitchen counter eating a red apple. Text in the corner reads: 'New Home, Google Gemini SB Commercial’ - [How Google Cloud is helping Team USA elevate their tricks with AI](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/infrastructure-and-cloud/google-cloud/us-ski-snowboard-tool-winter-olympics-2026/) (2026-02-05 16:00) - A woman outdoors in the snow looks at a tablet. A half pipe is behind her. - [Natively Adaptive Interfaces: A new framework for AI accessibility](https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/accessibility/natively-adaptive-interfaces-ai-accessibility/) (2026-02-05 17:00) - A collage of four images, the first of a woman with curly hair in front of a silver laptop, the second of the same woman and a man with short black hair speaking on a stairwell, the third of a the same man with glasses, and an aerial ima...
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing SyGra Studio](https://huggingface.co/blog/ServiceNow-AI/sygra-studio) (2026-02-05 16:52)
### OpenAI - [Navigating health questions with ChatGPT](https://openai.com/index/navigating-health-questions) (2026-02-05 00:00) - A family shares how ChatGPT helped them prepare for critical cancer treatment decisions for their son alongside expert guidance from his doctors. - [GPT-5.3-Codex System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-codex-system-card) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT‑5.3-Codex is the most capable agentic coding model to date, combining the frontier coding performance of GPT‑5.2-Codex with the reasoning and professional knowledge capabilities of GPT‑5.2. - [Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-3-codex) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT-5.3-Codex is a Codex-native agent that pairs frontier coding performance with general reasoning to support long-horizon, real-world technical work. - [Introducing OpenAI Frontier](https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-frontier) (2026-02-05 06:00) - OpenAI Frontier is an enterprise platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents with shared context, onboarding, permissions, and governance. - [Introducing Trusted Access for Cyber](https://openai.com/index/trusted-access-for-cyber) (2026-02-05 10:00) - OpenAI introduces Trusted Access for Cyber, a trust-based framework that expands access to frontier cyber capabilities while strengthening safeguards against misuse. - [GPT-5 lowers the cost of cell-free protein synthesis](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-lowers-protein-synthesis-cost) (2026-02-05 11:00) - An autonomous lab combining OpenAI’s GPT-5 with Ginkgo Bioworks’ cloud automation cut cell-free protein synthesis costs by 40% through closed-loop experimentation.
## 中文 ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Introducing Claude Opus 4.6](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-opus-4-6) (2026-02-05 00:00) - We’re upgrading our smartest model. Across agentic coding, computer use, tool use, search, and finance, Opus 4.6 is an industry-leading model, often by wide margin.
### Google AI Blog - [Watch our new Gemini ad ahead of football’s biggest weekend](https://blog.google/company-news/inside-google/company-announcements/gemini-ad-new-home/) (2026-02-05 14:30) - A toddler in a blue and yellow striped shirt sits on a kitchen counter eating a red apple. Text in the corner reads: 'New Home, Google Gemini SB Commercial’ - [How Google Cloud is helping Team USA elevate their tricks with AI](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/infrastructure-and-cloud/google-cloud/us-ski-snowboard-tool-winter-olympics-2026/) (2026-02-05 16:00) - A woman outdoors in the snow looks at a tablet. A half pipe is behind her. - [Natively Adaptive Interfaces: A new framework for AI accessibility](https://blog.google/company-news/outreach-and-initiatives/accessibility/natively-adaptive-interfaces-ai-accessibility/) (2026-02-05 17:00) - A collage of four images, the first of a woman with curly hair in front of a silver laptop, the second of the same woman and a man with short black hair speaking on a stairwell, the third of a the same man with glasses, and an aerial ima...
### Hugging Face Blog - [Introducing SyGra Studio](https://huggingface.co/blog/ServiceNow-AI/sygra-studio) (2026-02-05 16:52)
### OpenAI - [Navigating health questions with ChatGPT](https://openai.com/index/navigating-health-questions) (2026-02-05 00:00) - A family shares how ChatGPT helped them prepare for critical cancer treatment decisions for their son alongside expert guidance from his doctors. - [GPT-5.3-Codex System Card](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-3-codex-system-card) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT‑5.3-Codex is the most capable agentic coding model to date, combining the frontier coding performance of GPT‑5.2-Codex with the reasoning and professional knowledge capabilities of GPT‑5.2. - [Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex](https://openai.com/index/introducing-gpt-5-3-codex) (2026-02-05 00:00) - GPT-5.3-Codex is a Codex-native agent that pairs frontier coding performance with general reasoning to support long-horizon, real-world technical work. - [Introducing OpenAI Frontier](https://openai.com/index/introducing-openai-frontier) (2026-02-05 06:00) - OpenAI Frontier is an enterprise platform for building, deploying, and managing AI agents with shared context, onboarding, permissions, and governance. - [Introducing Trusted Access for Cyber](https://openai.com/index/trusted-access-for-cyber) (2026-02-05 10:00) - OpenAI introduces Trusted Access for Cyber, a trust-based framework that expands access to frontier cyber capabilities while strengthening safeguards against misuse. - [GPT-5 lowers the cost of cell-free protein synthesis](https://openai.com/index/gpt-5-lowers-protein-synthesis-cost) (2026-02-05 11:00) - An autonomous lab combining OpenAI’s GPT-5 with Ginkgo Bioworks’ cloud automation cut cell-free protein synthesis costs by 40% through closed-loop experimentation.

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-04)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic Anthropic explains why Claude will remain ad-free to ensure user trust and helpfulness, arguing that advertising incentives are incompatible with a genuinely helpful AI assistant. [Link](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-is-a-space-to-think)
### Google AI Blog Google AI Blog summarizes the latest AI news and updates announced in January 2026. [Link](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-january-2026/)
### Hugging Face Blog Hugging Face Blog introduces Nemotron ColEmbed V2, a top model for multimodal retrieval that raises the bar using ViDoRe V3. [Link](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-colembed-v2)
### OpenAI OpenAI details how VfL Wolfsburg integrated ChatGPT club-wide to scale efficiency and creativity while preserving their football identity. [Link](https://openai.com/index/vfl-wolfsburg)
OpenAI explains how to build the Codex App Server, a bidirectional JSON-RPC API for streaming progress, tool use, and approvals. [Link](https://openai.com/index/unlocking-the-codex-harness)
### Together AI Blog Together AI Blog announces the availability of Rime Arcana V3 Turbo and Rime Arcana V3 models. [Link](https://www.together.ai/blog/rime-arcana-v3-turbo-and-rime-arcana-v3-now-available-on-together-ai)
## 中文
### Anthropic Anthropic 解释了为什么 Claude 将保持无广告，以确保用户信任和有用性，并论证了广告激励与真正有用的 AI 助手是不兼容的。[链接](https://www.anthropic.com/news/claude-is-a-space-to-think)
### Google AI Blog Google AI 博客总结了 2026 年 1 月宣布的最新 AI 新闻和更新。[链接](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/products/google-ai-updates-january-2026/)
### Hugging Face Blog Hugging Face 博客介绍了 Nemotron ColEmbed V2，这是使用 ViDoRe V3 提升多模态检索标准的顶级模型。[链接](https://huggingface.co/blog/nvidia/nemotron-colembed-v2)
### OpenAI OpenAI 详细介绍了 VfL Wolfsburg 如何将 ChatGPT 集成到整个俱乐部，以扩大效率和创造力，同时保持其足球身份。[链接](https://openai.com/index/vfl-wolfsburg)
OpenAI 解释了如何构建 Codex App Server，这是一个用于流式传输进度、工具使用和审批的双向 JSON-RPC API。[链接](https://openai.com/index/unlocking-the-codex-harness)
### Together AI Blog Together AI 博客宣布 Rime Arcana V3 Turbo 和 Rime Arcana V3 模型现已上线。[链接](https://www.together.ai/blog/rime-arcana-v3-turbo-and-rime-arcana-v3-now-available-on-together-ai)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-03)
item.description:
## English
### Anthropic * Anthropic announces that Apple’s Xcode now supports the Claude Agent SDK, enabling developers to integrate Claude directly into iOS development. [https://www.anthropic.com/news/apple-xcode-claude-agent-sdk](https://www.anthropic.com/news/apple-xcode-claude-agent-sdk)
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face details training design lessons for text-to-image models based on ablation studies. [https://huggingface.co/blog/Photoroom/prx-part2](https://huggingface.co/blog/Photoroom/prx-part2) * Hugging Face explores the future of the global open-source AI ecosystem following the DeepSeek moment. [https://huggingface.co/blog/huggingface/one-year-since-the-deepseek-moment-blog-3](https://huggingface.co/blog/huggingface/one-year-since-the-deepseek-moment-blog-3) * Hugging Face introduces H Company's new Holo2 model, which leads in UI localization capabilities. [https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/introducing-holo2-235b-a22b](https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/introducing-holo2-235b-a22b)
### OpenAI * OpenAI outlines the philosophy behind the Sora feed, designed to spark creativity and ensure safety through personalized recommendations and guardrails. [https://openai.com/index/sora-feed-philosophy](https://openai.com/index/sora-feed-philosophy)
### Together AI * Together AI appoints Alon Gavrielov as VP of Infrastructure Strategy to strengthen its commitment to building reliable and scalable AI infrastructure. [https://www.together.ai/blog/alon-gavrielov-as-vp-of-infrastructure-strategy](https://www.together.ai/blog/alon-gavrielov-as-vp-of-infrastructure-strategy)
***
## 中文
### Anthropic * Anthropic 宣布 Apple 的 Xcode 现已支持 Claude Agent SDK，允许开发者直接在 iOS 开发中集成 Claude。 [https://www.anthropic.com/news/apple-xcode-claude-agent-sdk](https://www.anthropic.com/news/apple-xcode-claude-agent-sdk)
### Hugging Face * Hugging Face 分享了基于消融研究的文本到图像模型训练设计经验。 [https://huggingface.co/blog/Photoroom/prx-part2](https://huggingface.co/blog/Photoroom/prx-part2) * Hugging Face 探讨了 DeepSeek 时刻之后全球开源 AI 生态系统的未来。 [https://huggingface.co/blog/huggingface/one-year-since-the-deepseek-moment-blog-3](https://huggingface.co/blog/huggingface/one-year-since-the-deepseek-moment-blog-3) * Hugging Face 介绍了 H Company 的新 Holo2 模型，该模型在 UI 本地化方面表现领先。 [https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/introducing-holo2-235b-a22b](https://huggingface.co/blog/Hcompany/introducing-holo2-235b-a22b)
### OpenAI * OpenAI 阐述了 Sora feed 的理念，旨在通过个性化推荐、家长控制和严格护栏来激发创造力并确保体验安全。 [https://openai.com/index/sora-feed-philosophy](https://openai.com/index/sora-feed-philosophy)
### Together AI * Together AI 招聘 Alon Gavrielov 担任基础设施战略副总裁，以深化其构建可靠、高效 AI 基础设施的承诺。 [https://www.together.ai/blog/alon-gavrielov-as-vp-of-infrastructure-strategy](https://www.together.ai/blog/alon-gavrielov-as-vp-of-infrastructure-strategy)

item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-02-02)
item.description:
## English ### Anthropic (Newsroom) - [Anthropic partners with Allen Institute and Howard Hughes Medical Institute to accelerate scientific discovery](https://www.anthropic.com/news/anthropic-partners-with-allen-institute-and-howard-hughes-medical-institute) (2026-02-02 00:00)
### Google AI Blog - [Advancing AI benchmarking with Game Arena](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/models-and-research/google-deepmind/kaggle-game-arena-updates/) (2026-02-02 17:00) - An illustration of a King and Ace playing card, a wolf's head, two chess pieces, a poker chip, and other abstract shapes on a white background.1 - [How we’re helping preserve the genetic information of endangered species with AI](https://blog.google/innovation-and-ai/technology/ai/ai-to-preserve-endangered-species/) (2026-02-02 18:00) - A four-part vertical collage showing a cotton-top tamarin, an ibex, a golden lion tamarin, and a penguin.
### MiniMax (News) - [MiniMax Agent “卧底” Moltbook，聊天记录曝光](https://www.minimaxi.com/news/minimax-agent-卧底-moltbook聊天记录曝光) (2026-02-02 16:00)
### OpenAI - [Introducing the Codex app](https://openai.com/index/introducing-the-codex-app) (2026-02-02 00:00) - Introducing the Codex app for macOS—a command center for AI coding and software development with multiple agents, parallel workflows, and long-running tasks. - [Snowflake and OpenAI partner to bring frontier intelligence to enterprise data](https://openai.com/index/snowflake-partnership) (2026-02-02 06:00) - OpenAI and Snowflake partner in a $200M agreement to bring frontier intelligence into enterprise data, enabling AI agents and insights directly in Snowflake.
### Together AI Blog - [Together Evaluations now supports comparing top commercial APIs vs. open source models](https://www.together.ai/blog/together-evaluations-v2) (2026-02-02 00:00) - Together Evaluations now supports OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google models for cross-provider benchmarking. Compare open-source, fine-tuned, and proprietary models side-by-side to make data-driven decisions on quality, cost, and performance—... - [Fine-tuning open LLM judges to outperform GPT-5.2](https://www.together.ai/blog/fine-tuning-open-llm-judges-to-outperform-gpt-5-2) (2026-02-02 00:00) - Fine-tuned open-source LLM judges can outperform GPT-5.2 at evaluating model outputs. Using Direct Preference Optimization on just 5,400 preference pairs, we trained GPT-OSS 120B to beat GPT-5.2 on human preference alignment—at 15x lower...

Compare open-source, fine-tuned, and proprietary models side-by-side to make data-driven decisions on quality, cost, and performance—... - [Fine-tuning open LLM judges to outperform GPT-5.2](https://www.together.ai/blog/fine-tuning-open-llm-judges-to-outperform-gpt-5-2) (2026-02-02 00:00) - Fine-tuned open-source LLM judges can outperform GPT-5.2 at evaluating model outputs. item.title: Daily Digest / 日报摘要 (2026-01-29)
item.description:
## English ### OpenAI * Taisei Corporation uses ChatGPT Enterprise to support HR-led talent development and scale generative AI across its global construction business. [Link](https://openai.com/index/taisei) * On February 13, 2026, OpenAI will retire GPT‑4o, GPT‑4.1, GPT‑4.1 mini, and OpenAI o4-mini from ChatGPT, alongside the retirement of GPT‑5 models. [Link](https://openai.com/index/retiring-gpt-4o-and-older-models) * OpenAI built an in-house AI data agent using GPT-5, Codex, and memory to reason over massive datasets and deliver reliable insights in minutes. [Link](https://openai.com/index/inside-our-in-house-data-agent)
## 中文 ### OpenAI * 大成建设使用 ChatGPT Enterprise 来支持人力资源主导的人才发展，并在全球建筑业务中扩展生成式 AI 的应用。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/taisei) * 2026年2月13日，OpenAI 将从 ChatGPT 中停用 GPT‑4o、GPT‑4.1、GPT‑4.1 mini 和 OpenAI o4-mini，同时也会停用 GPT‑5 模型。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/retiring-gpt-4o-and-older-models) * OpenAI 构建了一个内部 AI 数据代理，利用 GPT-5、Codex 和记忆功能来处理海量数据集，并在几分钟内提供可靠的见解。 [链接](https://openai.com/index/inside-our-in-house-data-agent)
